articles.author: Rudy Ruitenberg
articles.title: More US troop withdrawals from Europe expected, NATO commander says - Military Times
articles.description: Gen. Alexus Grynkewich said Europe should "absolutely" expect additional U.S. troop withdrawals as NATO allies provide more of their own defense.
articles.content: PARIS Europe should absolutely expect additional United States troop withdrawals in the future as European NATO allies strengthen their capability to provide more of their own conventional defense, a… [+3865 chars]

articles.author: Mike Wall
articles.title: Vega C rocket launches European-Chinese space weather satellite to orbit - Space
articles.description: The SMILE mission lifted off at 11:52 p.m. ET on Monday (May 18).
